ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_group" TEXT /* Grouping of species (e.g., Amphibians, Reptiles) */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Taxonomic kingdom of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Taxonomic phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Taxonomic class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Taxonomic order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Taxonomic family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Taxonomic genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Taxonomic species of the species */,
  "endemic_to_europe" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the species is endemic to Europe */,
  "conservation_category" TEXT /* Conservation category according to the European Regional Red List */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Trend in the species population */,
  "iucn_red_list_category" TEXT /* IUCN Red List category (e.g., Extinct, Vulnerable) */,
  "red_list_year" INTEGER /* Year the species was last listed on the IUCN Red List */,
  "last_assessment_year" INTEGER /* Year the species was last assessed for conservation status */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "habitat_description" TEXT /* Description of the species' habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_conservation_category FOREIGN KEY ("conservation_category") REFERENCES conservation_status ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_kingdom FOREIGN KEY ("kingdom") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_endemic_to_europe FOREIGN KEY ("endemic_to_europe") REFERENCES endemic_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_population_trend FOREIGN KEY ("population_trend") REFERENCES population_trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus FOREIGN KEY ("genus") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_species_group FOREIGN KEY ("species_group") REFERENCES species_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_phylum FOREIGN KEY ("phylum") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_order FOREIGN KEY ("order") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the species group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species group */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the species group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic rank */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank (e.g., Kingdom, Phylum) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name at that taxonomic rank */,
  "parent_taxon_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the parent taxon */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of synonyms for the taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation category */,
  "iucn_category" TEXT /* Corresponding IUCN Red List category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the population trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population trend */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon representing the population trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endemic_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the endemic status */,
  "is_endemic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the species is endemic to Europe */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the endemic status */,
  "endemic_range" TEXT /* Geographic range where the species is endemic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_website" TEXT /* Website of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_projects" (
  "species_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species-project association */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species involved in the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "project_role" TEXT /* Role of the species in the project (e.g., study species, model organism) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_projects_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation measure */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species for which the measure is taken */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation measure */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the measure was implemented */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Assessment of the measure's effectiveness */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of conservation measure (e.g., habitat restoration, species reintroduction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_measures_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conservation area */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the conservation area in square kilometers */,
  "protected_status" TEXT /* Protected status of the area (e.g., National Park, Wildlife Refuge) */,
  "management_authority" TEXT /* Authority responsible for managing the conservation area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_conservation_areas" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species-conservation area association */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species found in the conservation area */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation area */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the species in the conservation area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_conservation_areas_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_conservation_areas_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES conservation_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species observed */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the observation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the observer (e.g., taxonomy, ecology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of authors */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_publications" (
  "species_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species-publication association */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species discussed in the publication */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the publication to the species conservation (e.g., High, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_publications_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_publications_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species depicted in the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "copyright_holder" TEXT /* Name of the copyright holder for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species depicted in the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "copyright_holder" TEXT /* Name of the copyright holder for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species associated with the audio file */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL of the audio file */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the audio file */,
  "copyright_holder" TEXT /* Name of the copyright holder for the audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the original news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_conservation_news" (
  "species_news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species-news association */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species discussed in the news article */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the news article to the species conservation (e.g., High, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_conservation_news_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES conservation_news ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_conservation_news_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
